title: Phase 1: PDF & Checkout Fixes
description: Simplified PDF format (removed WHO/WHAT/WHEN/WHERE header and staff column), fixed checkout flow, added PDF download button in checkout modal
verify: Open checkout modal → verify PDF download button → click and verify PDF format is simplified
verify_manual: Full workflow: checkin → service → checkout → download PDF → verify no Staff column

title: Phase 2: Multiple Treatments UI
description: Add/edit/delete treatments on active visits, show treatments in checkout modal, treatment buttons on in_service and service_completed visits
verify: Start service → click '+Tx' → add 2 treatments → edit duration → delete one → checkout shows remaining treatment
verify_manual: Ops Board → Active Visits → in_service visit → '+Tx' button exists → works

title: Phase 3: Treatment Records Page
description: New 'Treatments' tab with date/patient/staff filters, displays all treatments across all visits with therapist/modality/duration/room
verify: Navigate to Treatments tab → set date filter → verify treatments appear → staff filter works
verify_manual: Add treatments to 2 visits → go to Treatments tab → see both treatments listed

title: Phase 4: Selective PDF Generation
description: Checkboxes on visit history table, 'Select All' checkbox, 'Selected PDF' button enabled when >=1 selected, backend accepts visit_ids parameter
verify: Patient modal → check 2 visits → click 'Selected (2) PDF' → verify PDF contains only those 2 visits
verify_manual: Patient with 5 visits → select 3 → download → PDF has exactly 3 visits

title: PostgreSQL event_log + core events
description: SQLAlchemy models for event_log table and core event types (ROOM_CREATED, STAFF_CREATED, PATIENT_CHECKED_IN, SERVICE_STARTED, SERVICE_ENDED, PATIENT_CHECKED_OUT). DB-agnostic (SQLite local, Supabase prod).
verify: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -k 'event_log or core_events' -q --tb=short
verify_manual: POST /prototype/portal/checkin → GET /prototype/events → event appears in list

title: DB-backed projections (room-board, staff-hours, daily-report)
description: Projection tables rebuilt from event_log. Endpoints: GET /prototype/projections/room-board, GET /prototype/projections/staff-hours, POST /prototype/reports/daily/generate.
verify: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -k 'projection or room_board or staff_hours or daily_report' -q --tb=short
verify_manual: Run full E2E flow → GET /prototype/projections/room-board → all rooms visible with correct status

title: Auth + RBAC guards
description: JWT-based auth with role enforcement. Roles: admin, front_desk, provider. Guards on admin-only routes (/prototype/admin/*). Login endpoint returns JWT.
verify: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -k 'auth or rbac or login' -q --tb=short
verify_manual: Call /prototype/admin/rooms without token → 401. With admin token → 200.

title: Admin portal UI (room/staff CRUD)
description: Admin tab: create/edit rooms and staff. Calls /prototype/admin/rooms and /prototype/admin/staff. Shows current room list and staff roster.
verify: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -k 'admin_portal or room_crud or staff_crud' -q --tb=short
verify_manual: Open UI → Admin tab → create room 'Room 1' → appears in room board

title: User portal — visit lifecycle flow
description: Front desk tab: patient check-in → service start (assign room + provider) → service end → checkout. Each step calls the matching API and updates visible state.
verify: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -k 'visit_lifecycle or checkin or checkout' -q --tb=short
verify_manual: Check in patient → start service → end service → checkout → patient gone from active list

title: Live dashboard — room board + staff hours
description: Dashboard tab: real-time room occupancy board and staff hours worked today. Auto-refreshes every 30s. Data from GET /prototype/projections/room-board and /staff-hours.
verify: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -k 'dashboard or live_board' -q --tb=short
verify_manual: Start service in Room 1 → dashboard shows Room 1 as occupied within 30s

title: API + flow tests (happy path + failure cases)
description: pytest E2E coverage: full visit lifecycle, admin CRUD, edge cases (double check-in, checkout without service end, invalid room). All tests pass against local SQLite.
verify_manual: pytest output shows 0 failures, covers checkin/service/checkout/admin flows

title: PHI/logging/RBAC compliance audit
description: Verify: no PHI in log output, RBAC enforced on all admin endpoints, all write operations produce audit event, event_log is append-only (no UPDATE/DELETE).
verify: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -k 'compliance or phi or audit' -q --tb=short
verify_manual: Run server with DEBUG logging → grep logs for patient names/DOBs → none found

title: Final code review + go/no-go
description: Reviewer (SDE-B) checks: event-sourcing invariants upheld, no business logic in routers, all endpoints have schema validation, test coverage adequate. Produces BLOCKER/NON-BLOCKER/SUGGESTION comments.
verify: manual — reviewer produces review doc with zero BLOCKERs
verify_manual: Reviewer doc at tasks/M1-REV-01-review.md with verdict: APPROVED

title: Multiple treatments per visit — backend
description: visit_treatments table, 5 API endpoints (add/update/delete/list/filter), event logging (TREATMENT_ADDED/UPDATED/DELETED). Supports multiple modalities per visit with different therapists and durations.
verify_manual: POST /visits/{id}/treatments/add → GET /visits/{id}/treatments → list includes added treatment

title: Multiple treatments UI — active visits
description: Add treatment button on active visit cards, treatment list with edit/delete, add treatment modal with modality dropdown and duration input.
verify_manual: Open active visit → click Add Treatment → select E-stim → save → treatment appears in list

title: Treatment records page
description: New Treatment Records tab with filters (date range, patient, staff, modality). Table shows patient, date, modality, therapist, duration, room. Export to CSV.
verify_manual: Open Treatment Records tab → filter by date range → table shows matching treatments

title: Enhanced checkout with treatment summary
description: Checkout modal shows read-only treatment summary table before completion. Checkbox to 'Generate PDF for patient signature'. PDF includes all treatments in visit history.
verify_manual: Checkout patient → see treatment summary → check 'Generate PDF' → PDF downloaded with all treatments

title: Selective PDF generation
description: Patient detail modal shows checkboxes next to each visit. 'Download Selected Visits PDF' button generates PDF for only checked visits. Uses ?visit_ids=x,y,z query param.
verify_manual: Open patient detail → check 2 visits → Download Selected PDF → PDF contains only those 2 visits
